post.description: Submit a parsing task to the shared async task manager, wait for it to finish, and return the final parsing result in the same response.
Submit files for parsing and return immediately with a task id that can be checked via the task status and result endpoints.

files.title: Files
files.description: Upload PDF, image, DOCX, PPTX, or XLSX files for parsing

lang_list.title: Lang List
lang_list.description:
(Adapted for pipeline backend only) Input the languages in the pdf to improve OCR accuracy. Options:
- ch: Chinese, English, Japanese, Chinese Traditional, Latin.
- ch_server: Chinese, English, Japanese, Chinese Traditional, Latin.
- korean: Korean, English.
- ta: Tamil, English.
- te: Telugu, English.
- ka: Kannada.
- th: Thai, English.
- el: Greek, English.
- arabic: Arabic, Persian, Uyghur, Urdu, Pashto, Kurdish, Sindhi, Balochi, English.
- east_slavic: Russian, Belarusian, Ukrainian, English.
- cyrillic: Russian, Belarusian, Ukrainian, Serbian (Cyrillic), Bulgarian, Mongolian, Abkhazian, Adyghe, Kabardian, Avar, Dargin, Ingush, Chechen, Lak, Lezgin, Tabasaran, Kazakh, Kyrgyz, Tajik, Macedonian, Tatar, Chuvash, Bashkir, Malian, Moldovan, Udmurt, Komi, Ossetian, Buryat, Kalmyk, Tuvan, Sakha, Karakalpak, English.
- devanagari: Hindi, Marathi, Nepali, Bihari, Maithili, Angika, Bhojpuri, Magahi, Santali, Newari, Konkani, Sanskrit, Haryanvi, English.

backend.title: Backend
backend.description:
The backend for parsing:
- pipeline: More general, supports multiple languages, hallucination-free.
- vlm-engine: High accuracy via local computing power, supports Chinese and English documents only.
- vlm-http-client: High accuracy via remote computing power(client suitable for openai-compatible servers), supports Chinese and English documents only.
- hybrid-engine: Hybrid parsing via local computing power, supports multiple languages. Use effort to switch medium/high behavior.
- hybrid-http-client: Hybrid parsing via remote computing power but requires a little local computing power(client suitable for openai-compatible servers), supports multiple languages. Use effort to switch medium/high behavior.

effort.title: Effort
effort.description:
(Adapted only for hybrid backend) Hybrid parsing effort:
- medium: Faster parsing for most documents, balancing accuracy and efficiency. Image/chart analysis is disabled.
- high: Higher-accuracy parsing with image/chart analysis support, which may take longer.

parse_method.title: Parse Method
parse_method.description:
(Adapted only for pipeline and hybrid backend)The method for parsing PDF:
- auto: Automatically determine the method based on the file type
- txt: Use text extraction method
- ocr: Use OCR method for image-based PDFs

image_analysis.title: Image Analysis
image_analysis.description: Enable image/chart analysis for VLM and hybrid backends. Hybrid medium effort automatically disables image/chart analysis.

server_url.title: Server Url
server_url.description: (Adapted only for <vlm/hybrid>-http-client backend)openai compatible server url, e.g., http://127.0.0.1:30000

return_model_output.title: Return Model Output
return_model_output.description: Return model output JSON in response

return_content_list.title: Return Content List
return_content_list.description: Return content list JSON in response

response_format_zip.title: Response Format Zip
response_format_zip.description: Return results as a ZIP file instead of JSON

return_original_file.title: Return Original File
return_original_file.description: Include the processed original input file in the ZIP result; ignored unless response_format_zip=true

client_side_output_generation.title: Client Side Output Generation
client_side_output_generation.description: Defer final markdown/content-list generation to the client. When enabled, the server returns staged middle JSON, model output, and images.

start_page_id.title: Start Page Id
start_page_id.description: The starting page for PDF parsing, beginning from 0

end_page_id.title: End Page Id
end_page_id.description: The ending page for PDF parsing, beginning from 0
